zh.lifeSummary: 當Annabella Boyd of Kilmarnock於1460年出生在蘇格蘭雷福福爾時，她的父親Sir William Gordon 1st Of Lochinvar35歲，母親Mariota Janet Maxwell Of Calderwood41歲。她於1472年與Sir John Gordon 2nd Of Lochinvar在英國蘇格蘭結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1488年在蘇格蘭培爾肯莫享年28歲，埋葬在蘇格蘭。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Annabella Boyd of Kilmarnock于1460年出生在苏格兰雷福福爾时，她的父亲Sir William Gordon 1st Of Lochinvar35岁，母亲Mariota Janet Maxwell Of Calderwood41岁。她于1472年与Sir John Gordon 2nd Of Lochinvar在英国苏格兰结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1488年在苏格兰培爾肯莫享年28岁，埋葬在苏格兰。

nameMeanings.name: Boyd
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish: habitational name from the island of Bute in the Firth of Clyde, from Bòid (genitive case of Bòd, the Gaelic name of the island of Bute) or Bòideach, denoting a person from Bute. Alternatively, the name may denote descendants of a Gilla filius Boed, who appears in reference to Glasgow Cathedral in the early 12th century, perhaps from the Gaelic personal name Boite, of uncertain origin.
Scottish and Irish: from the Gaelic epithet buidhe ‘yellow(-haired)’. Compare Bowie .
Manx: from Mac Gille Buidhe ‘son of the yellow-haired lad’ (compare 2 above).

variants.name: Bowie
meanings: Scottish: from Gaelic buidhe ‘yellow’, i.e. ‘yellow-haired’, pronounced as two syllables. The equivalent term in Ireland is buí, often Anglicized as boy. The surname may also be a shortened form of Gilboy .
Irish: Anglicized form of Ó Buadhaigh (see Bogue ).

nameMeanings.name: Annabella
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Sometimes taken as an elaboration of   Anna  , but more probably a dissimilated form of   Amabel .  It has been common in Scotland since the 12th century and was still in use in England in the 1600s. Its recent revival in popularity in England and elsewhere dates from the 1940s.

variants.name: Annabell
meanings: Sometimes taken as an elaboration of   Anna  , but more probably a dissimilated form of   Amabel .  It has been common in Scotland since the 12th century and was still in use in England in the 1600s. Its recent revival in popularity in England and elsewhere dates from the 1940s.

variants.name: Annabelle
meanings: Sometimes taken as an elaboration of   Anna  , but more probably a dissimilated form of   Amabel .  It has been common in Scotland since the 12th century and was still in use in England in the 1600s. Its recent revival in popularity in England and elsewhere dates from the 1940s.

en.lifeSummary: When Annabella Boyd of Kilmarnock was born in 1460, in Renfrewshire, Scotland, her father, Sir William Gordon 1st Of Lochinvar, was 35 and her mother, Mariota Janet Maxwell Of Calderwood, was 41. She married Sir John Gordon 2nd Of Lochinvar in 1472, in Scotland, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 1 daughter. She died in 1488, in Kenmore, Perthshire, Scotland, at the age of 28, and was buried in Scotland.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Annabella Boyd of Kilmarnock est née en 1460, à Renfrewshire, Écosse, son père, Sir William Gordon 1st Of Lochinvar, avait 35 ans et sa mère, Mariota Janet Maxwell Of Calderwood, avait 41 ans. Elle a épousé Sir John Gordon 2nd Of Lochinvar en 1472, à Écosse, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée en 1488, à Kenmore, Perthshire, Écosse, à l’âge de 28 ans, et a été enterrée à Écosse.

de.lifeSummary: Als Annabella Boyd of Kilmarnock 1460 in Renfrewshire, Scotland geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir William Gordon 1st Of Lochinvar 35 und ihre Mutter Mariota Janet Maxwell Of Calderwood 41. Sie hat 1472 in Schottland, United Kingdom Sir John Gordon 2nd Of Lochinvar geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb 1488 im Alter von 28 Jahren in Kenmore, Perthshire, Scotland und wurde in Scotland begraben.

ja.lifeSummary: Annabella Boyd of Kilmarnockが1460年にスコットランドレンフリューシュアイアで生まれた時，父Sir William Gordon 1st Of Lochinvarは35歳，母Mariota Janet Maxwell Of Calderwoodは41歳であった。1472年にイギリススコットランドでSir John Gordon 2nd Of Lochinvarと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1488年にスコットランドペルスシュアイアケンモーで28歳で死去し，スコットランドにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Annabella Boyd of Kilmarnock(이)가 1460년 스컷랜드 렌프레w실르에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir William Gordon 1st Of Lochinvar(은)는 35세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Mariota Janet Maxwell Of Calderwood(은)는 41세였다. 그녀는 1472년 영국 스코틀랜드에서 Sir John Gordon 2nd Of Lochinvar(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1488년 스컷랜드 퍼스실르 켄모어에서 28세의 나이로 사망했으며 스컷랜드에 묻혔다.

Ela casou-se com Sir John Gordon 2nd Of Lochinvar em 1472, em Escócia, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 1 filha. ru.lifeSummary: Когда Annabella Boyd of Kilmarnock родилась в 1460 г. в местности ренфрюшир, Шотландия, её отцу по имени Sir William Gordon 1st Of Lochinvar было 35 лет, а матери, которую звали Mariota Janet Maxwell Of Calderwood, 41. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir John Gordon 2nd Of Lochinvar в 1472 г. в местности Шотландия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь. Она умерла в 1488 г. в местности кенмор, пиртшир, Шотландия в возрасте 28 лет и была похоронена в местности Шотландия.
